services.name: Relocation Survey
services.shortDescription: Determines and verifies boundary lines of existing properties for transfer of ownership or title issuance.
services.note: Excess area beyond the first 10,000 sqm is billed proportionally when interpolation mode is ON.

services.name: Original Survey (Untitled)
services.shortDescription: Establishes boundary lines and area of untitled or unregistered land for original title application.
services.note: Excludes CENRO inspection fee, survey authority, and other required certificates.

services.name: Simple Subdivision Survey
services.shortDescription: Divides a mother lot into a few resultant lots (typically 2–5) for individual titling.
services.note: If the mother lot is untitled, CENRO inspection fee, survey authority, and other certificates are excluded.

services.name: Complex Subdivision Survey
services.shortDescription: Subdivides large properties into multiple lots for residential, commercial, or mixed-use development.

services.name: Consolidation Survey
services.shortDescription: Combines two or more adjacent lots into a single consolidated property for unified titling.
services.note: If the mother lot is untitled, CENRO inspection fee, survey authority, and other certificates are excluded.

services.name: Boundary Survey (Area Only)
services.shortDescription: Determines the perimeter and area of a property without full subdivision or titling.
services.note: Includes sketch plan with vicinity map.

services.name: Topographic Survey — Nearly Flat
services.shortDescription: Maps ground elevation and features on relatively level terrain for engineering design and planning.

services.name: Topographic Survey — Rough Terrain
services.shortDescription: Maps ground elevation and features on hilly or rugged terrain for engineering design and planning.

services.name: Hydrographic Survey
services.shortDescription: Measures underwater features, depths, and water boundaries for navigation, construction, or resource assessment.

services.name: Irrigation Canal — Location & Profile
services.shortDescription: Establishes the horizontal alignment and longitudinal profile of proposed irrigation canals.

services.name: Irrigation Canal — ROW Cross-Sectioning
services.shortDescription: Measures cross-sectional profiles along the canal right-of-way for earthwork computation.

services.name: Irrigation Canal — Checking to Grade
services.shortDescription: Verifies canal grade and alignment to ensure construction matches design specifications.

services.name: Route Survey — Road (Centerline)
services.shortDescription: Establishes the centerline alignment of proposed roads with horizontal and vertical control.

services.name: Route Survey — Profile Leveling
services.shortDescription: Determines the elevation profile along a route for grading and drainage design.

services.name: Route Survey — Cross-Section
services.shortDescription: Measures cross-sectional terrain profiles perpendicular to the route for cut-and-fill calculations.

services.name: Route Survey — Full Package
services.shortDescription: Complete route survey including reconnaissance, preliminary alignment, and final design surveys.

services.name: Route Survey — Transmission Line
services.shortDescription: Surveys the alignment of proposed transmission lines with tower position staking.

services.name: Parcellary Survey (Right of Way)
services.shortDescription: Identifies and documents affected lots along a right-of-way for acquisition and compensation.

services.name: Height Clearance (CAAP)
services.shortDescription: Verifies that structures meet CAAP height clearance requirements near airports and flight paths.

services.name: As-Built Survey — Roads
services.shortDescription: Documents the final constructed location and elevation of completed roads.

services.name: As-Built Survey — Building
services.shortDescription: Documents the final constructed dimensions and location of completed buildings.

services.name: Mineral Survey — Approved Plan
services.shortDescription: Surveys mineral claim boundaries in accordance with an approved exploration plan.

services.name: Mineral Survey — Exploration / Drilling
services.shortDescription: Establishes grid control and stakes borehole or drilling positions for mineral exploration.
services.note: A minimum of 20 drilling points is enforced.

services.name: Mineral Survey — Quarry Site
services.shortDescription: Surveys the boundaries and volume of quarry sites for extraction permits.

services.name: Mineral Survey — Small Scale Mining
services.shortDescription: Surveys small-scale mining claim boundaries for regulatory compliance.

services.name: Sketch Plan
services.shortDescription: Produces a simplified lot plan or vicinity map for basic reference or documentation.

services.name: Mining Claims Plan (with NAMRIA Map)
services.shortDescription: Prepares a mining claims map overlaid on NAMRIA topographic base for regulatory submission.

services.name: Land Use Mapping
services.shortDescription: Classifies and maps land use categories over a defined area for planning and zoning.

services.name: Subdivision Scheme (Complex Subdivision)
services.shortDescription: Designs the layout of lots, roads, and open spaces for complex subdivision development.

services.name: UAV Mapping
services.shortDescription: Captures high-resolution aerial imagery and generates orthophotos, DEMs, and 3D models.
services.note: Includes post-processing. A 100-hectare minimum charge applies.

services.name: Court Appearance
services.shortDescription: Geodetic engineer expert testimony in court regarding survey evidence and property boundaries.
services.note: Appearance fee for court hearings per scheduled date.

services.name: Technical Consultation
services.shortDescription: Professional advice on survey methods, property boundaries, mapping, and geodetic engineering.

services.name: Reconnaissance
services.shortDescription: Preliminary field inspection to assess site conditions and survey feasibility.

services.name: Equipment Rental
services.shortDescription: Short-term rental of surveying instruments with or without operator.
services.note: Daily rental rates for surveying equipment.

services.name: Mylar / BL Plan Printing
services.shortDescription: Reproduction of survey plans on Mylar film or blueprint paper for submission and archiving.
